PowerShell($content = Get-Content "E:\\Demo\\dibrugarh-korean-club-api\\database\\seeders\\Learning\\VocabularySeeder.php" -Encoding utf8 -Raw; $lines = $content -split "`n"; for \($i=0; $i -lt $lines.Count; $i++\) { if \($lines[$i] -match [char]0x2019\) { Write-Output "$\($i+1\): $\($lines[$i]\)" } })

PowerShell($content = Get-Content "E:\\Demo\\dibrugarh-korean-club-api\\database\\seeders\\Learning\\VocabularySeeder.php" -Encoding utf8 -Raw; $lines = $content -split "`n"; for \($i=0; $i -lt $lines.Count; $i++\) { if \($lines[$i] -match [char]0x2018\) { Write-Output "$\($i+1\): $\($lines[$i]\)" } })

PowerShell($file = "E:\\Demo\\dibrugarh-korean-club-api\\database\\seeders\\Learning\\VocabularySeeder.php"; $text = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($file, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\); $lines = $text -split "`n"; $line = $lines[262]; Write-Output "Line 263: $line"; $bytes = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($line\); Write-Output "Hex: $\($bytes | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString\('X2'\) } | Where-Object { [Convert]::ToInt32\($_, 16\) -gt 127 } | Select-Object -First 60\)")

PowerShell($file = "E:\\Demo\\dibrugarh-korean-club-api\\database\\seeders\\Learning\\VocabularySeeder.php"; $text = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($file, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\); $lines = $text -split "`n"; $line = $lines[262]; $bytes = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($line\); # Print all bytes with their positions for \($i=0; $i -lt $bytes.Count; $i++\) { if \($bytes[$i] -ge 0x27 -and $bytes[$i] -le 0x60\) { Write-Output "Pos $i byte 0x$\($bytes[$i].ToString\('X2'\)\): char '$\([char]$bytes[$i]\)'" } })

PowerShell($file = "E:\\Demo\\dibrugarh-korean-club-api\\database\\seeders\\Learning\\VocabularySeeder.php"; $text = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($file, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\); $lines = $text -split "`n"; $line = $lines[262]; # Find the problematic segment - look for the Assamese example text $idx = $line.IndexOf\([char]0x9B'E0'\); Write-Output "line length: $\($line.Length\)"; # Find all quote chars for \($i=0; $i -lt $line.Length; $i++\) { $c = $line[$i]; $code = [int]$c; if \($code -eq 39 -or \($code -ge 0x2018 -and $code -le 0x201F\) -or $code -eq 0x60 -or $code -eq 0xB4\) { Write-Output "Pos $i codepoint U+$\($code.ToString\('X4'\)\): '$c'" } })

PowerShell($file = "E:\\Demo\\dibrugarh-korean-club-api\\database\\seeders\\Learning\\VocabularySeeder.php"; $text = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($file, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\); $lines = $text -split "`n"; $line = $lines[262]; # Show all unique codepoints in the Assamese example text $start = $line.IndexOf\("'বাছ ষ্টপত"\); Write-Output "start: $start, line len: $\($line.Length\)"; $seg = $line.Substring\($start, [Math]::Min\(40, $line.Length - $start\)\); Write-Output "Segment: $seg"; foreach \($c in $seg.ToCharArray\(\)\) { Write-Output "U+$\([int]$c .ToString\('X4'\)\) = $c" })

PowerShell($file = "E:\\Demo\\dibrugarh-korean-club-api\\database\\seeders\\Learning\\VocabularySeeder.php"; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($file\); $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\); # Find all occurrences of Assamese-script char followed by plain apostrophe $matches = [regex]::Matches\($text, "[ঀ-৿]'"\); foreach \($m in $matches\) { $start = [Math]::Max\(0, $m.Index - 10\); $len = [Math]::Min\(40, $text.Length - $start\); Write-Output "Offset $\($m.Index\): $\($text.Substring\($start,$len\)\)" })

PowerShell($file = "E:\\Demo\\dibrugarh-korean-club-api\\database\\seeders\\Learning\\VocabularySeeder.php"; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($file\); $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\); # The file has ৰ \(U+09F0\) followed by ' \(U+0027\) - find context around it $idx = $text.IndexOf\("ৰ'"\); if \($idx -ge 0\) { Write-Output "Found at $idx"; $start = [Math]::Max\(0, $idx - 20\); Write-Output $text.Substring\($start, 60\) } else { Write-Output "Not found" })

PowerShell($file = "E:\\Demo\\dibrugarh-korean-club-api\\database\\seeders\\Learning\\VocabularySeeder.php"; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($file\); if \($bytes[0] -eq 0xEF -and $bytes[1] -eq 0xBB -and $bytes[2] -eq 0xBF\) { Write-Output "BOM found, stripping"; $noBom = $bytes[3..\($bytes.Length-1\)]; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllBytes\($file, $noBom\) } else { Write-Output "No BOM" })
